allow: PowerShell($json = '{"tool_name":"TaskCreate","tool_input":{},"tool_response":{"taskId":"abc-123","title":"Test task"}}'; $input = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; $id = if \($input.tool_response.taskId\) { $input.tool_response.taskId } elseif \($input.tool_response.id\) { $input.tool_response.id } else { 'unknown' }; @{hookSpecificOutput = @{hookEventName = 'PostToolUse'; additionalContext = "Task created. Call TaskGet with id '$id' to select it."}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)
